【1v1双洁＋感情线甜宠一见钟情＋男主同一人+微悬疑】

明瑶进入梦境，每个世界的反派、男主、权势大佬，全都自动变成了她的专属恋爱脑。

斗？不需要。争？没必要。
只要大佬够恋爱脑，她躺平就能走上人生巅峰，日子爽到飞起！

　　梦境一：【松岚洋楼】✔️
　　豪门联姻\先婚后爱

       人人敬畏的商界帝王，却在深夜红着眼尾把她圈在怀：“你就是我的，这辈子别想跑。

　　梦境二：【千禧小城】✔️
　　闭塞小镇\哥妹禁忌

        他是她名义上的哥哥，却在雨夜把她按在门后，声音沙哑：“瑶瑶，别叫我哥。”

　　梦境三：【校园笔仙】
　　花季雨季\懵懂青春

　　他是清冷学神，却在晚自习后偷偷塞给她一张纸条：“明瑶，我喜欢你，从第一眼就开始了。”

　　梦境四：【萨瓦迪卡】
     
        他是泰国王子，却在她的小摊前，一把将她按进怀里，声音低沉又危险：“你的糯米饭我买了，你的人，我也预定了，从现在起，你只能是我的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/76daec6bf2bf36478c83395b2da7d825~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"肉松老贝","author_id":"","book_id":"7603578486803942425","book_name":"绝美炮灰又被大佬一见钟情了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302870","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6793人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":477,"name":"一见钟情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=477&name=一见钟情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":456,"name":"情有独钟","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=456&name=情有独钟&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7603578760369029657","read_count":"6793","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"209550"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"93","tags":"快穿,独宠,大佬,宠妻,一见钟情,情有独钟","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/76daec6bf2bf36478c83395b2da7d825~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444719&x-signature=Qb9yE%2FC%2FT30WZbqCQRfL%2ByUwjGc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3118682764218472","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318115934958448FFFA7309D974"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix
